 1. `initializeMarket()` prepares a CTF condition and emits `MarketInitialized` (triggers CRE).  2. CRE detects the event, calls Gemini AI, then submits `onReport(metadata, report)`.  3. The adapter starts a `disputeWindow` timer and emits `ResolutionProposed`.  4. After the window, an authorized finalizer calls `finalizeResolution()` to call `ctf.reportPayouts()`.  5. Before the window elapses (public finalize):     - The contract owner can `adminOverride()` to replace the proposed payouts.     - The multisig (if set) can call `multisigOverride()` which requires M-of-N signers.  6. Owner / multisig bypass (no need to wait for CRE or resolution time):     - `adminResolve()` \u2014 owner sets payouts and resolves immediately (Active or Proposed, any time).     - `adminOverride()` \u2014 also allowed while Active to start a proposal + dispute window without CRE.     - `multisigOverride()` \u2014 signers may begin or complete resolution while Active (first approvals       move the market to Proposed and open the usual dispute window for public finalize). Key invariants:  - AiCTFAdapter is the sole oracle address in every `prepareCondition()` call.  - No market string metadata is stored on-chain \u2014 only the IPFS CID via events.  - `finalizeResolution` requires the dispute window to elapse; caller must be owner, multisig signer,    upkeep finalizer, or any address when no multisig/upkeep is configured (local dev).","errors":{"OwnableInvalidOwner(address)":[{"details":"The owner is not a valid owner account. 1 : 0);\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @dev Return the log in base 2 of a positive value rounded towards zero.\n     * Returns 0 if given 0.\n     */\n    function log2(uint256 value) internal pure returns (uint256) {\n        uint256 result = 0;\n        unchecked {\n            if (value >> 128 > 0) {\n                value >>= 128;\n                result += 128;\n            }\n            if (value >> 64 > 0) {\n                value >>= 64;\n                result += 64;\n            }\n            if (value >> 32 > 0) {\n                value >>= 32;\n                result += 32;\n            }\n            if (value >> 16 > 0) {\n                value >>= 16;\n                result += 16;\n            }\n            if (value >> 8 > 0) {\n                value >>= 8;\n                result += 8;\n            }\n            if (value >> 4 > 0) {\n                value >>= 4;\n                result += 4;\n            }\n            if (value >> 2 > 0) {\n                value >>= 2;\n                result += 2;\n            }\n            if (value >> 1 > 0) {\n                result += 1;\n            }\n        }\n        return result;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @dev Return the log in base 2, following the selected rounding direction, of a positive value.\n     * Returns 0 if given 0.\n     */\n    function log2(uint256 value, Rounding rounding) internal pure returns (uint256) {\n        unchecked {\n            uint256 result = log2(value);\n            return result + (unsignedRoundsUp(rounding) && 1 << result < value ? 1 : 0);\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @dev Return the log in base 10 of a positive value rounded towards zero.\n     * Returns 0 if given 0.\n     */\n    function log10(uint256 value) internal pure returns (uint256) {\n        uint256 result = 0;\n        unchecked {\n            if (value >= 10 ** 64) {\n                value /= 10 ** 64;\n                result += 64;\n            }\n            if (value >= 10 ** 32) {\n                value /= 10 ** 32;\n                result += 32;\n            }\n            if (value >= 10 ** 16) {\n                value /= 10 ** 16;\n                result += 16;\n            }\n            if (value >= 10 ** 8) {\n                value /= 10 ** 8;\n                result += 8;\n            }\n            if (value >= 10 ** 4) {\n                value /= 10 ** 4;\n                result += 4;\n            }\n            if (value >= 10 ** 2) {\n                value /= 10 ** 2;\n                result += 2;\n            }\n            if (value >= 10 ** 1) {\n                result += 1;\n            }\n        }\n        return result;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @dev Return the log in base 10, following the selected rounding direction, of a positive value.\n     * Returns 0 if given 0.\n     */\n    function log10(uint256 value, Rounding rounding) internal pure returns (uint256) {\n        unchecked {\n            uint256 result = log10(value);\n            return result + (unsignedRoundsUp(rounding) && 10 ** result < value ? 1 : 0);\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @dev Return the log in base 256 of a positive value rounded towards zero.\n     * Returns 0 if given 0.\n     *\n     * Adding one to the result gives the number of pairs of hex symbols needed to represent `value` as a hex string.\n     */\n    function log256(uint256 value) internal pure returns (uint256) {\n        uint256 result = 0;\n        unchecked {\n            if (value >> 128 > 0) {\n                value >>= 128;\n                result += 16;\n            }\n            if (value >> 64 > 0) {\n                value >>= 64;\n                result += 8;\n            }\n            if (value >> 32 > 0) {\n                value >>= 32;\n                result += 4;\n            }\n            if (value >> 16 > 0) {\n                value >>= 16;\n                result += 2;\n            }\n            if (value >> 8 > 0) {\n                result += 1;\n            }\n        }\n        return result;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @dev Return the log in base 256, following the selected rounding direction, of a positive value.\n     * Returns 0 if given 0.\n     */\n    function log256(uint256 value, Rounding rounding) internal pure returns (uint256) {\n        unchecked {\n            uint256 result = log256(value);\n            return result + (unsignedRoundsUp(rounding) && 1 << (result << 3) < value ? 1 : 0);\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @dev Returns whether a provided rounding mode is considered rounding up for unsigned integers.\n     */\n    function unsignedRoundsUp(Rounding rounding) internal pure returns (bool) {\n        return uint8(rounding) % 2 == 1;\n    }\n}\n","keccak256":"0x005ec64c6313f0555d59e278f9a7a5ab2db5bdc72a027f255a37c327af1ec02d","license":"MIT"},"contracts/AiCTFAdapter.sol":{"content":"// SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT\npragma solidity ^0.8.20;\n\nimport { ReceiverTemplate } from \"./ReceiverTemplate.sol\";\nimport { ConditionalTokens } from \"./ConditionalTokens.sol\";\n\n/**\n * @title AiCTFAdapter\n * @notice Oracle adapter that resolves Conditional Token Framework markets via Chainlink CRE + Gemini AI.\n *\n * @dev Architecture:\n *  1. `initializeMarket()` prepares a CTF condition and emits `MarketInitialized` (triggers CRE).\n *  2. CRE detects the event, calls Gemini AI, then submits `onReport(metadata, report)`.\n *  3. The adapter starts a `disputeWindow` timer and emits `ResolutionProposed`.\n *  4. After the window, an authorized finalizer calls `finalizeResolution()` to call `ctf.reportPayouts()`.\n *  5. Before the window elapses (public finalize):\n *     - The contract owner can `adminOverride()` to replace the proposed payouts.\n *     - The multisig (if set) can call `multisigOverride()` which requires M-of-N signers.\n *  6. Owner / multisig bypass (no need to wait for CRE or resolution time):\n *     - `adminResolve()` \u2014 owner sets payouts and resolves immediately (Active or Proposed, any time).\n *     - `adminOverride()` \u2014 also allowed while Active to start a proposal + dispute window without CRE.\n *     - `multisigOverride()` \u2014 signers may begin or complete resolution while Active (first approvals\n *       move the market to Proposed and open the usual dispute window for public finalize).\n *\n * Key invariants:\n *  - AiCTFAdapter is the sole oracle address in every `prepareCondition()` call.\n *  - No market string metadata is stored on-chain \u2014 only the IPFS CID via events.\n *  - `finalizeResolution` requires the dispute window to elapse; caller must be owner, multisig signer,\n *    upkeep finalizer, or any address when no multisig/upkeep is configured (local dev).\n */\ncontract AiCTFAdapter is ReceiverTemplate {\n    ////////////////////////////////////////////////////\n    // Types\n    ////////////////////////////////////////////////////\n\n    enum MarketStatus { Uninitialized, Active, Proposed, Resolved }\n\n    struct MarketQuestion {\n        uint256 resolutionTime;     // Target resolution timestamp\n        uint256 proposedAt;         // Timestamp when CRE submitted a proposal\n        uint256[] proposedPayouts;  // Payouts proposed by AI\n        uint256 outcomeCount;       // Number of outcome slots\n        MarketStatus status;\n        bool multisigApproved;      // Set to true once multisig threshold is met\n    }\n\n    ////////////////////////////////////////////////////\n    // State\n    ////////////////////////////////////////////////////\n\n    /// @notice The Gnosis Conditional Token Framework contract\n    ConditionalTokens public immutable ctf;\n\n    /// @notice Duration of the dispute window after a resolution is proposed\n    uint256 public disputeWindow;\n\n    /// @notice Minimum number of multisig signers required to approve an override\n    uint256 public multisigThreshold;\n\n    /// @notice List of authorised multisig signers\n    address[] public multisigSigners;\n\n    /// @notice questionId \u2192 MarketQuestion\n    mapping(bytes32 => MarketQuestion) public questions;\n\n    /// @notice questionId \u2192 signer \u2192 has approved the pending proposal override\n    mapping(bytes32 => mapping(address => bool)) public multisigApprovals;\n\n    /// @notice questionId \u2192 current multisig approval count for a proposed override\n    mapping(bytes32 => uint256) public multisigApprovalCount;\n\n    /// @notice Address of the MarketRegistry (only it may call initializeMarket)\n    address public registry;\n\n    /// @notice Optional Chainlink Automation upkeep allowed to call finalizeResolution\n    address public upkeepFinalizer;\n\n    ////////////////////////////////////////////////////\n    // Events\n    ////////////////////////////////////////////////////\n\n    event MarketInitialized(\n        bytes32 indexed questionId,\n        string  ipfsCid,\n        uint256 outcomeCount,\n        uint256 resolutionTime\n    );\n\n    event ResolutionProposed(\n        bytes32 indexed questionId,\n        uint256[] payouts,\n        uint256 disputeWindowEnd\n    );\n\n    event ResolutionProposalReplaced(\n        bytes32 indexed questionId,\n        uint256[] newPayouts,\n        address  replacedBy\n    );\n\n    event MarketResolved(\n        bytes32 indexed questionId,\n        uint256[] payouts\n    );\n\n    event MultisigOverrideApproved(\n        bytes32 indexed questionId,\n        address indexed signer,\n        uint256 approvalsNow,\n        uint256 threshold\n    );\n\n    event MultisigThresholdUpdated(uint256 newThreshold);\n    event MultisigSignersUpdated(address[] newSigners);\n    event DisputeWindowUpdated(uint256 newWindow);\n    event RegistryUpdated(address newRegistry);\n\n    ////////////////////////////////////////////////////\n    // Errors\n    ////////////////////////////////////////////////////\n\n    error NotRegistry();\n    error AlreadyInitialized();\n    error NotInitialized();\n    error AlreadyResolved();\n    error DisputeWindowActive();\n    error DisputeWindowExpired();\n    error NoProposalPending();\n    error NotMultisigSigner();\n    error AlreadyApproved();\n    error ThresholdNotMet();\n    error InvalidPayouts();\n    error InvalidDisputeWindow();\n    error InvalidThreshold();\n    error ZeroOutcomeCount();\n    error NotAuthorizedFinalizer();\n\n    ////////////////////////////////////////////////////\n    // Modifiers\n    ////////////////////////////////////////////////////\n\n    modifier onlyRegistry() {\n        if (msg.sender != registry) revert NotRegistry();\n        _;\n    }\n\n    ////////////////////////////////////////////////////\n    // Constructor\n    ////////////////////////////////////////////////////\n\n    /**\n     * @param _ctf              Address of the deployed ConditionalTokens contract.\n     * @param _forwarderAddress Chainlink CRE forwarder (only address allowed to call onReport).\n     * @param _disputeWindow    Seconds after a proposal before it can be finalized.\n     * @param _multisigSigners  Initial list of multisig signer addresses.\n     * @param _multisigThreshold Minimum approvals required (must be \u2264 _multisigSigners.length).\n     */\n    constructor(\n        address _ctf,\n        address _forwarderAddress,\n        uint256 _disputeWindow,\n        address[] memory _multisigSigners,\n        uint256 _multisigThreshold\n    ) ReceiverTemplate(_forwarderAddress) {\n        if (_disputeWindow == 0) revert InvalidDisputeWindow();\n        if (_multisigSigners.length > 0 && (_multisigThreshold == 0 || _multisigThreshold > _multisigSigners.length)) {\n            revert InvalidThreshold();\n        }\n        ctf = ConditionalTokens(_ctf);\n        disputeWindow = _disputeWindow;\n        multisigSigners = _multisigSigners;\n        multisigThreshold = _multisigThreshold;\n    }\n\n    ////////////////////////////////////////////////////\n    // Initialisation (called by MarketRegistry)\n    ////////////////////////////////////////////////////\n\n    /**\n     * @notice Registers a new prediction market with the CTF and Chainlink CRE.\n     * @dev Only callable by the MarketRegistry contract.\n     *      Emits MarketInitialized \u2014 this event is the CRE log trigger.\n     * @param questionId      keccak256(abi.encodePacked(ipfsCid))\n     * @param ipfsCid         IPFS CID of the JSON metadata \u2014 NOT stored on-chain, emitted only.\n     * @param outcomeCount    Number of outcome slots (2 for binary markets).\n     * @param resolutionTime  Unix timestamp when CRE should attempt resolution.\n     */\n    function initializeMarket(\n        bytes32 questionId,\n        string calldata ipfsCid,\n        uint256 outcomeCount,\n        uint256 resolutionTime\n    ) external onlyRegistry {\n        if (outcomeCount < 2) revert ZeroOutcomeCount();\n        MarketQuestion storage q = questions[questionId];\n        if (q.status != MarketStatus.Uninitialized) revert AlreadyInitialized();\n\n        // Prepare the condition on the CTF \u2014 no new contract deployed\n        ctf.prepareCondition(address(this), questionId, outcomeCount);\n\n        q.resolutionTime  = resolutionTime;\n        q.outcomeCount    = outcomeCount;\n        q.status          = MarketStatus.Active;\n\n        // CRE listens for this event to schedule the AI resolution job\n        emit MarketInitialized(questionId, ipfsCid, outcomeCount, resolutionTime);\n    }\n\n    ////////////////////////////////////////////////////\n    // CRE Callback (called by Chainlink Forwarder)\n    ////////////////////////////////////////////////////\n\n    /**\n     * @notice Internal hook invoked by ReceiverTemplate.onReport() after forwarder validation.\n     * @dev Report format: abi.encode(bytes32 questionId, uint256[] payouts)\n     *      Starts the dispute window; finalization is via finalizeResolution().\n     */\n    function _processReport(bytes calldata report) internal override {\n        (bytes32 questionId, uint256[] memory payouts) = abi.decode(report, (bytes32, uint256[]));\n\n        MarketQuestion storage q = questions[questionId];\n        if (q.status == MarketStatus.Uninitialized) revert NotInitialized();\n        if (q.status == MarketStatus.Resolved) revert AlreadyResolved();\n        if (!_isValidPayouts(payouts, q.outcomeCount)) revert InvalidPayouts();\n\n        // Replace any existing proposal (CRE may resubmit after a dispute)\n        q.proposedPayouts = payouts;\n        q.proposedAt      = block.timestamp;\n        q.status          = MarketStatus.Proposed;\n        // Reset multisig approval state for the new proposal\n        _resetMultisigApprovals(questionId);\n\n        emit ResolutionProposed(questionId, payouts, block.timestamp + disputeWindow);\n    }\n\n    ////////////////////////////////////////////////////\n    // Owner immediate resolution (any time after init)\n    ////////////////////////////////////////////////////\n\n    /**\n     * @notice Owner may resolve immediately with the given payouts.\n     * @dev Works while market is Active (before CRE) or Proposed. Bypasses resolution time,\n     *      dispute window, and CRE. Does not require a prior AI proposal.\n     * @param questionId The market to resolve.\n     * @param payouts    Payout numerators per outcome (same semantics as CTF `reportPayouts`).\n     */\n    function adminResolve(bytes32 questionId, uint256[] calldata payouts) external onlyOwner {\n        MarketQuestion storage q = questions[questionId];\n        if (q.status == MarketStatus.Uninitialized) revert NotInitialized();\n        if (q.status == MarketStatus.Resolved) revert AlreadyResolved();\n        if (!_isValidPayouts(payouts, q.outcomeCount)) revert InvalidPayouts();\n\n        q.proposedPayouts = payouts;\n        q.proposedAt = block.timestamp;\n        _resetMultisigApprovals(questionId);\n        _resolve(questionId, q);\n    }\n\n    ////////////////////////////////////////////////////\n    // Finalization (permissionless after dispute window)\n    ////////////////////////////////////////////////////\n\n    /**\n     * @notice Finalizes a proposed resolution after the dispute window elapses.\n     * @dev Callable by owner, multisig signers, or the registered upkeep finalizer.\n     *      When no multisig and no upkeep are configured (dev), any address may finalize.\n     * @param questionId The market to finalize.\n     */\n    function finalizeResolution(bytes32 questionId) external {\n        if (!_canFinalizeResolution(msg.sender)) revert NotAuthorizedFinalizer();\n\n        MarketQuestion storage q = questions[questionId];\n        if (q.status == MarketStatus.Uninitialized) revert NotInitialized();\n        if (q.status != MarketStatus.Proposed) revert NoProposalPending();\n        if (q.status == MarketStatus.Resolved) revert AlreadyResolved();\n        if (block.timestamp < q.proposedAt + disputeWindow) revert DisputeWindowActive();\n\n        _resolve(questionId, q);\n    }\n\n    ////////////////////////////////////////////////////\n    // Owner Override (Active: open proposal; Proposed: within dispute window only)\n    ////////////////////////////////////////////////////\n\n    /**\n     * @notice Owner replaces payouts and (re)starts the dispute window without resolving.\n     * @dev While Active: sets status to Proposed and opens the dispute window (no CRE required).\n     *      While Proposed: only callable before the dispute window ends (same as before).\n     * @param questionId  The market to override.\n     * @param payouts     Payout array for the new proposal.\n     */\n    function adminOverride(bytes32 questionId, uint256[] calldata payouts) external onlyOwner {\n        MarketQuestion storage q = questions[questionId];\n        if (q.status == MarketStatus.Uninitialized) revert NotInitialized();\n        if (q.status == MarketStatus.Resolved) revert AlreadyResolved();\n\n        if (q.status == MarketStatus.Active) {\n            if (!_isValidPayouts(payouts, q.outcomeCount)) revert InvalidPayouts();\n            q.proposedPayouts = payouts;\n            q.proposedAt = block.timestamp;\n            q.status = MarketStatus.Proposed;\n            _resetMultisigApprovals(questionId);\n            emit ResolutionProposalReplaced(questionId, payouts, msg.sender);\n            emit ResolutionProposed(questionId, payouts, block.timestamp + disputeWindow);\n            return;\n        }\n\n        if (q.status != MarketStatus.Proposed) revert NoProposalPending();\n        if (block.timestamp >= q.proposedAt + disputeWindow) revert DisputeWindowExpired();\n        if (!_isValidPayouts(payouts, q.outcomeCount)) revert InvalidPayouts();\n\n        q.proposedPayouts = payouts;\n        q.proposedAt = block.timestamp;\n        _resetMultisigApprovals(questionId);\n\n        emit ResolutionProposalReplaced(questionId, payouts, msg.sender);\n        emit ResolutionProposed(questionId, payouts, block.timestamp + disputeWindow);\n    }\n\n    ////////////////////////////////////////////////////\n    // Multisig Override (Active or Proposed during dispute window)\n    ////////////////////////////////////////////////////\n\n    /**\n     * @notice A multisig signer approves the current pending proposal override.\n     * @dev Once `multisigThreshold` approvals are collected, the resolution is finalized\n     *      immediately \u2014 bypassing the remaining dispute window.\n     *      While Active: signers pin payouts, the market moves to Proposed, then approvals accrue;\n     *      meeting threshold finalizes immediately (same as after a CRE proposal).\n     *      While Proposed: the dispute window must still be open (same as before).\n     * @param questionId  The market question ID.\n     * @param payouts     The new payout array all signers are approving.\n     *                    All signers must supply identical payouts; any mismatch resets approvals.\n     */\n    function multisigOverride(bytes32 questionId, uint256[] calldata payouts) external {\n        MarketQuestion storage q = questions[questionId];\n        if (q.status == MarketStatus.Uninitialized) revert NotInitialized();\n        if (q.status == MarketStatus.Resolved) revert AlreadyResolved();\n        if (q.status != MarketStatus.Proposed && q.status != MarketStatus.Active) revert NoProposalPending();\n        if (!_isMultisigSigner(msg.sender)) revert NotMultisigSigner();\n        if (multisigApprovals[questionId][msg.sender]) revert AlreadyApproved();\n        if (!_isValidPayouts(payouts, q.outcomeCount)) revert InvalidPayouts();\n\n        if (q.status == MarketStatus.Active) {\n            if (q.proposedPayouts.length != payouts.length || !_payoutsMatch(payouts, q.proposedPayouts)) {\n                q.proposedPayouts = payouts;\n                q.proposedAt = block.timestamp;\n                q.status = MarketStatus.Proposed;\n                _resetMultisigApprovals(questionId);\n                emit ResolutionProposalReplaced(questionId, payouts, msg.sender);\n                emit ResolutionProposed(questionId, payouts, block.timestamp + disputeWindow);\n            }\n        } else {\n            if (block.timestamp >= q.proposedAt + disputeWindow) revert DisputeWindowExpired();\n            if (!_payoutsMatch(payouts, q.proposedPayouts)) {\n                q.proposedPayouts = payouts;\n                q.proposedAt = block.timestamp;\n                _resetMultisigApprovals(questionId);\n                emit ResolutionProposalReplaced(questionId, payouts, msg.sender);\n                emit ResolutionProposed(questionId, payouts, block.timestamp + disputeWindow);\n            }\n        }\n\n        multisigApprovals[questionId][msg.sender] = true;\n        multisigApprovalCount[questionId]++;\n\n        emit MultisigOverrideApproved(questionId, msg.sender, multisigApprovalCount[questionId], multisigThreshold);\n\n        if (multisigApprovalCount[questionId] >= multisigThreshold) {\n            q.multisigApproved = true;\n            _resolve(questionId, q);\n        }\n    }\n\n    ////////////////////////////////////////////////////\n    // Internal Helpers\n    ////////////////////////////////////////////////////\n\n    function _canFinalizeResolution(address caller) internal view returns (bool) {\n        if (caller == owner()) return true;\n        if (upkeepFinalizer != address(0) && caller == upkeepFinalizer) return true;\n        if (multisigSigners.length > 0 && _isMultisigSigner(caller)) return true;\n        // Dev / open networks with no governance signers and no automation hook\n        if (multisigSigners.length == 0 && upkeepFinalizer == address(0)) return true;\n        return false;\n    }\n\n    function _resolve(bytes32 questionId, MarketQuestion storage q) internal {\n        q.status = MarketStatus.Resolved;\n        // AiCTFAdapter is the oracle \u2014 msg.sender does not matter here, ctf checks address(this)\n        ctf.reportPayouts(questionId, q.proposedPayouts);\n        emit MarketResolved(questionId, q.proposedPayouts);\n    }\n\n    function _isValidPayouts(uint256[] memory payouts, uint256 outcomeCount) internal pure returns (bool) {\n        if (payouts.length != outcomeCount) return false;\n        uint256 sum = 0;\n        for (uint256 i = 0; i < payouts.length; i++) sum += payouts[i];\n        return sum > 0;\n    }\n\n    function _payoutsMatch(uint256[] calldata a, uint256[] storage b) internal view returns (bool) {\n        if (a.length != b.length) return false;\n        for (uint256 i = 0; i < a.length; i++) {\n            if (a[i] != b[i]) return false;\n        }\n        return true;\n    }\n\n    function _isMultisigSigner(address addr) internal view returns (bool) {\n        for (uint256 i = 0; i < multisigSigners.length; i++) {\n            if (multisigSigners[i] == addr) return true;\n        }\n        return false;\n    }\n\n    function _resetMultisigApprovals(bytes32 questionId) internal {\n        for (uint256 i = 0; i < multisigSigners.length; i++) {\n            multisigApprovals[questionId][multisigSigners[i]] = false;\n        }\n        multisigApprovalCount[questionId] = 0;\n        questions[questionId].multisigApproved = false;\n    }\n\n    ////////////////////////////////////////////////////\n    // Admin Configuration\n    ////////////////////////////////////////////////////\n\n    /// @notice Only the deployer (owner) can set the registry address.\n    function setRegistry(address _registry) external onlyOwner {\n        registry = _registry;\n        emit RegistryUpdated(_registry);\n    }\n\n    function setUpkeepFinalizer(address _finalizer) external onlyOwner {\n        upkeepFinalizer = _finalizer;\n    }\n\n    function setDisputeWindow(uint256 _window) external onlyOwner {\n        if (_window == 0) revert InvalidDisputeWindow();\n        disputeWindow = _window;\n        emit DisputeWindowUpdated(_window);\n    }\n\n    function setMultisigSigners(address[] calldata _signers, uint256 _threshold) external onlyOwner {\n        if (_signers.length > 0 && (_threshold == 0 || _threshold > _signers.length)) revert InvalidThreshold();\n        multisigSigners = _signers;\n        multisigThreshold = _threshold;\n        emit MultisigSignersUpdated(_signers);\n        emit MultisigThresholdUpdated(_threshold);\n    }\n\n    ////////////////////////////////////////////////////\n    // View Functions\n    ////////////////////////////////////////////////////\n\n    function getQuestion(bytes32 questionId) external view returns (MarketQuestion memory) {\n        return questions[questionId];\n    }\n\n    function getDisputeWindowEnd(bytes32 questionId) external view returns (uint256) {\n        MarketQuestion storage q = questions[questionId];\n        if (q.status != MarketStatus.Proposed) return 0;\n        return q.proposedAt + disputeWindow;\n    }\n\n    function isMultisigSigner(address addr) external view returns (bool) {\n        return _isMultisigSigner(addr);\n    }\n\n    function getMultisigSigners() external view returns (address[] memory) {\n        return multisigSigners;\n    }\n}\n","keccak256":"0x46814391df2f010880a142d936b899d73490aabfdae4abf2d793a764759641b1","license":"MIT"},"contracts/ConditionalTokens.sol":{"content":"// SPDX-License-Identifier: LGPL-3.0\n// Adapted from Gnosis Conditional Token Framework for Solidity ^0.8.0\n// Original: https://github.com/gnosis/conditional-tokens-contracts\npragma solidity ^0.8.0;\n\nimport { IERC20 } from \"@openzeppelin/contracts/token/ERC20/IERC20.sol\";\nimport { ERC1155 } from \"@openzeppelin/contracts/token/ERC1155/ERC1155.sol\";\n\n/**\n * @title ConditionalTokens\n * @notice Core Gnosis Conditional Token Framework \u2014 markets are conditionIds, not deployed contracts.\n * @dev Ported from Gnosis CTF (^0.5.1) to Solidity ^0.8.0 (SafeMath removed, native overflow).\n * ERC-1155 position IDs are derived deterministically from collateral + conditionId + indexSet.\n */\ncontract ConditionalTokens is ERC1155 {\n    /////////////////////////////\n    // Events\n    /////////////////////////////\n\n    /// @dev Emitted on prepareCondition()\n    event ConditionPreparation(\n        bytes32 indexed conditionId,\n        address indexed oracle,\n        bytes32 indexed questionId,\n        uint256 outcomeSlotCount\n    );\n\n    /// @dev Emitted on reportPayouts()\n    event ConditionResolution(\n        bytes32 indexed conditionId,\n        address indexed oracle,\n        bytes32 indexed questionId,\n        uint256 outcomeSlotCount,\n        uint256[] payoutNumerators\n    );\n\n    /// @dev Emitted on splitPosition()\n    event PositionSplit(\n        address indexed stakeholder,\n        IERC20 collateralToken,\n        bytes32 indexed parentCollectionId,\n        bytes32 indexed conditionId,\n        uint256[] partition,\n        uint256 amount\n    );\n\n    /// @dev Emitted on mergePositions()\n    event PositionsMerge(\n        address indexed stakeholder,\n        IERC20 collateralToken,\n        bytes32 indexed parentCollectionId,\n        bytes32 indexed conditionId,\n        uint256[] partition,\n        uint256 amount\n    );\n\n    event PayoutRedemption(\n        address indexed redeemer,\n        IERC20 indexed collateralToken,\n        bytes32 indexed parentCollectionId,\n        bytes32 conditionId,\n        uint256[] indexSets,\n        uint256 payout\n    );\n\n    /////////////////////////////\n    // State\n    /////////////////////////////\n\n    /// @notice Payout numerators per conditionId. Empty = not prepared.\n    mapping(bytes32 => uint256[]) public payoutNumerators;\n\n    /// @notice Payout denominator; nonzero = condition resolved.\n    mapping(bytes32 => uint256) public payoutDenominator;\n\n    constructor() ERC1155(\"\") {}\n\n    /////////////////////////////\n    // Core Functions\n    /////////////////////////////\n\n    /**\n     * @notice Registers a new condition (market) on-chain.\n     * @param oracle         The address that will call reportPayouts() for this condition.\n     * @param questionId     Unique question identifier (keccak256 of IPFS CID).\n     * @param outcomeSlotCount Number of outcomes (2 for binary YES/NO).\n     */\n    function prepareCondition(address oracle, bytes32 questionId, uint256 outcomeSlotCount) external {\n        require(outcomeSlotCount <= 256, \"CTF: too many outcome slots\");\n        require(outcomeSlotCount > 1, \"CTF: need more than one outcome slot\");\n        bytes32 conditionId = getConditionId(oracle, questionId, outcomeSlotCount);\n        require(payoutNumerators[conditionId].length == 0, \"CTF: condition already prepared\");\n        payoutNumerators[conditionId] = new uint256[](outcomeSlotCount);\n        emit ConditionPreparation(conditionId, oracle, questionId, outcomeSlotCount);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @notice Called by the oracle to resolve a condition.\n     * @param questionId  The question ID the oracle is answering.\n     * @param payouts     Array of payout numerators per outcome slot.\n     */\n    function reportPayouts(bytes32 questionId, uint256[] calldata payouts) external {\n        uint256 outcomeSlotCount = payouts.length;\n        require(outcomeSlotCount > 1, \"CTF: need more than one outcome slot\");\n        bytes32 conditionId = getConditionId(msg.sender, questionId, outcomeSlotCount);\n        require(payoutNumerators[conditionId].length == outcomeSlotCount, \"CTF: condition not prepared\");\n        require(payoutDenominator[conditionId] == 0, \"CTF: already resolved\");\n\n        uint256 den = 0;\n        for (uint256 i = 0; i < outcomeSlotCount; i++) {\n            uint256 num = payouts[i];\n            den += num;\n            require(payoutNumerators[conditionId][i] == 0, \"CTF: numerator already set\");\n            payoutNumerators[conditionId][i] = num;\n        }\n        require(den > 0, \"CTF: all-zero payout\");\n        payoutDenominator[conditionId] = den;\n        emit ConditionResolution(conditionId, msg.sender, questionId, outcomeSlotCount, payoutNumerators[conditionId]);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @notice Splits a collateral position into outcome positions.\n     * @param collateralToken  ERC-20 used as collateral (e.g. USDC).\n     * @param parentCollectionId  bytes32(0) for root positions.\n     * @param conditionId      The condition to split on.\n     * @param partition        Array of disjoint index sets.\n     * @param amount           Amount of collateral to lock.\n     */\n    function splitPosition(\n        IERC20 collateralToken,\n        bytes32 parentCollectionId,\n        bytes32 conditionId,\n        uint256[] calldata partition,\n        uint256 amount\n    ) external {\n        require(partition.length > 1, \"CTF: need at least 2 partition elements\");\n        uint256 outcomeSlotCount = payoutNumerators[conditionId].length;\n        require(outcomeSlotCount > 0, \"CTF: condition not prepared\");\n\n        uint256 fullIndexSet = (1 << outcomeSlotCount) - 1;\n        uint256 freeIndexSet = fullIndexSet;\n        uint256[] memory positionIds = new uint256[](partition.length);\n        uint256[] memory amounts = new uint256[](partition.length);\n\n        for (uint256 i = 0; i < partition.length; i++) {\n            uint256 indexSet = partition[i];\n            require(indexSet > 0 && indexSet < fullIndexSet, \"CTF: invalid index set\");\n            require((indexSet & freeIndexSet) == indexSet, \"CTF: partition not disjoint\");\n            freeIndexSet ^= indexSet;\n            positionIds[i] = getPositionId(collateralToken, getCollectionId(parentCollectionId, conditionId, indexSet));\n            amounts[i] = amount;\n        }\n\n        if (freeIndexSet == 0) {\n            if (parentCollectionId == bytes32(0)) {\n                require(collateralToken.transferFrom(msg.sender, address(this), amount), \"CTF: collateral transfer failed\");\n            } else {\n                _burn(msg.sender, getPositionId(collateralToken, parentCollectionId), amount);\n            }\n        } else {\n            _burn(\n                msg.sender,\n                getPositionId(\n                    collateralToken,\n                    getCollectionId(parentCollectionId, conditionId, fullIndexSet ^ freeIndexSet)\n                ),\n                amount\n            );\n        }\n\n        _mintBatch(msg.sender, positionIds, amounts, \"\");\n        emit PositionSplit(msg.sender, collateralToken, parentCollectionId, conditionId, partition, amount);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @notice Merges outcome positions back into collateral.\n     */\n    function mergePositions(\n        IERC20 collateralToken,\n        bytes32 parentCollectionId,\n        bytes32 conditionId,\n        uint256[] calldata partition,\n        uint256 amount\n    ) external {\n        require(partition.length > 1, \"CTF: need at least 2 partition elements\");\n        uint256 outcomeSlotCount = payoutNumerators[conditionId].length;\n        require(outcomeSlotCount > 0, \"CTF: condition not prepared\");\n\n        uint256 fullIndexSet = (1 << outcomeSlotCount) - 1;\n        uint256 freeIndexSet = fullIndexSet;\n        uint256[] memory positionIds = new uint256[](partition.length);\n        uint256[] memory amounts = new uint256[](partition.length);\n\n        for (uint256 i = 0; i < partition.length; i++) {\n            uint256 indexSet = partition[i];\n            require(indexSet > 0 && indexSet < fullIndexSet, \"CTF: invalid index set\");\n            require((indexSet & freeIndexSet) == indexSet, \"CTF: partition not disjoint\");\n            freeIndexSet ^= indexSet;\n            positionIds[i] = getPositionId(collateralToken, getCollectionId(parentCollectionId, conditionId, indexSet));\n            amounts[i] = amount;\n        }\n\n        _burnBatch(msg.sender, positionIds, amounts);\n\n        if (freeIndexSet == 0) {\n            if (parentCollectionId == bytes32(0)) {\n                require(collateralToken.transfer(msg.sender, amount), \"CTF: collateral return failed\");\n            } else {\n                _mint(msg.sender, getPositionId(collateralToken, parentCollectionId), amount, \"\");\n            }\n        } else {\n            _mint(\n                msg.sender,\n                getPositionId(\n                    collateralToken,\n                    getCollectionId(parentCollectionId, conditionId, fullIndexSet ^ freeIndexSet)\n                ),\n                amount,\n                \"\"\n            );\n        }\n\n        emit PositionsMerge(msg.sender, collateralToken, parentCollectionId, conditionId, partition, amount);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @notice Redeems winning outcome positions for collateral after resolution.\n     */\n    function redeemPositions(\n        IERC20 collateralToken,\n        bytes32 parentCollectionId,\n        bytes32 conditionId,\n        uint256[] calldata indexSets\n    ) external {\n        uint256 den = payoutDenominator[conditionId];\n        require(den > 0, \"CTF: condition not resolved\");\n        uint256 outcomeSlotCount = payoutNumerators[conditionId].length;\n        require(outcomeSlotCount > 0, \"CTF: condition not prepared\");\n\n        uint256 totalPayout = 0;\n        uint256 fullIndexSet = (1 << outcomeSlotCount) - 1;\n\n        for (uint256 i = 0; i < indexSets.length; i++) {\n            uint256 indexSet = indexSets[i];\n            require(indexSet > 0 && indexSet < fullIndexSet, \"CTF: invalid index set\");\n            uint256 positionId = getPositionId(\n                collateralToken,\n                getCollectionId(parentCollectionId, conditionId, indexSet)\n            );\n\n            uint256 payoutNumerator = 0;\n            for (uint256 j = 0; j < outcomeSlotCount; j++) {\n                if (indexSet & (1 << j) != 0) {\n                    payoutNumerator += payoutNumerators[conditionId][j];\n                }\n            }\n\n            uint256 payoutStake = balanceOf(msg.sender, positionId);\n            if (payoutStake > 0) {\n                totalPayout += (payoutStake * payoutNumerator) / den;\n                _burn(msg.sender, positionId, payoutStake);\n            }\n        }\n\n        if (totalPayout > 0) {\n            if (parentCollectionId == bytes32(0)) {\n                require(collateralToken.transfer(msg.sender, totalPayout), \"CTF: payout transfer failed\");\n            } else {\n                _mint(msg.sender, getPositionId(collateralToken, parentCollectionId), totalPayout, \"\");\n            }\n        }\n\n        emit PayoutRedemption(msg.sender, collateralToken, parentCollectionId, conditionId, indexSets, totalPayout);\n    }\n\n    /////////////////////////////\n    // View Helpers\n    /////////////////////////////\n\n    /// @notice Returns number of outcome slots, or 0 if not prepared.\n    function getOutcomeSlotCount(bytes32 conditionId) external view returns (uint256) {\n        return payoutNumerators[conditionId].length;\n    }\n\n    /// @notice conditionId = keccak256(oracle, questionId, outcomeSlotCount)\n    function getConditionId(address oracle, bytes32 questionId, uint256 outcomeSlotCount)\n        public\n        pure\n        returns (bytes32)\n    {\n        return keccak256(abi.encodePacked(oracle, questionId, outcomeSlotCount));\n    }\n\n    /// @notice collectionId = keccak256(parentCollectionId ^ keccak256(conditionId, indexSet))\n    function getCollectionId(bytes32 parentCollectionId, bytes32 conditionId, uint256 indexSet)\n        public\n        pure\n        returns (bytes32)\n    {\n        return bytes32(uint256(keccak256(abi.encodePacked(conditionId, indexSet))) + uint256(parentCollectionId));\n    }\n\n    /// @notice positionId = keccak256(collateralToken, collectionId)\n    function getPositionId(IERC20 collateralToken, bytes32 collectionId) public pure returns (uint256) {\n        return uint256(keccak256(abi.encodePacked(collateralToken, collectionId)));\n    }\n}\n","keccak256":"0xf24494cb839273e2a8a0847dfe38cbb80101c9cd6e979523d46e80a8c3ff206c","license":"LGPL-3.0"},"contracts/ReceiverTemplate.sol":{"content":"// SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT\npragma solidity ^0.8.20;\n\nimport { IERC165 } from \"@openzeppelin/contracts/interfaces/IERC165.sol\";\nimport { Ownable } from \"@openzeppelin/contracts/access/Ownable.sol\";\n\n/**\n * @title IReceiver\n * @notice Interface for CRE report receivers.\n */\ninterface IReceiver is IERC165 {\n    function onReport(bytes calldata metadata, bytes calldata report) external;\n}\n\n/**\n * @title ReceiverTemplate\n * @notice Abstract base contract for receiving Chainlink CRE workflow reports.\n * @dev Copied verbatim structure from cre-gcp-prediction-market-demo with AiCTFAdapter customisation.\n *      Forwarder address is required; optional workflow identity checks enforce which CRE job can call.\n */\nabstract contract ReceiverTemplate is IReceiver, Ownable {\n    // Required \u2014 set at construction; only this address may call onReport\n    address private s_forwarderAddress;\n\n    // Optional identity guards (all zero = disabled)\n    address private s_expectedAuthor;\n    bytes10 private s_expectedWorkflowName;\n    bytes32 private s_expectedWorkflowId;\n\n    bytes private constant HEX_CHARS = \"0123456789abcdef\";\n\n    error InvalidForwarderAddress();\n    error InvalidSender(address sender, address expected);\n    error InvalidAuthor(address received, address expected);\n    error InvalidWorkflowName(bytes10 received, bytes10 expected);\n    error InvalidWorkflowId(bytes32 received, bytes32 expected);\n    error WorkflowNameRequiresAuthorValidation();\n\n    event ForwarderAddressUpdated(address indexed previousForwarder, address indexed newForwarder);\n    event ExpectedAuthorUpdated(address indexed previousAuthor, address indexed newAuthor);\n    event ExpectedWorkflowNameUpdated(bytes10 indexed previousName, bytes10 indexed newName);\n    event ExpectedWorkflowIdUpdated(bytes32 indexed previousId, bytes32 indexed newId);\n    event SecurityWarning(string message);\n\n    constructor(address _forwarderAddress) Ownable(msg.sender) {\n        if (_forwarderAddress == address(0)) revert InvalidForwarderAddress();\n        s_forwarderAddress = _forwarderAddress;\n        emit ForwarderAddressUpdated(address(0), _forwarderAddress);\n    }\n\n    /// @inheritdoc IReceiver\n    function onReport(bytes calldata metadata, bytes calldata report) external override {\n        if (s_forwarderAddress != address(0) && msg.sender != s_forwarderAddress) {\n            revert InvalidSender(msg.sender, s_forwarderAddress);\n        }\n\n        if (\n            s_expectedWorkflowId != bytes32(0) ||\n            s_expectedAuthor != address(0) ||\n            s_expectedWorkflowName != bytes10(0)\n        ) {\n            (bytes32 workflowId, bytes10 workflowName, address workflowOwner) = _decodeMetadata(metadata);\n\n            if (s_expectedWorkflowId != bytes32(0) && workflowId != s_expectedWorkflowId) {\n                revert InvalidWorkflowId(workflowId, s_expectedWorkflowId);\n            }\n            if (s_expectedAuthor != address(0) && workflowOwner != s_expectedAuthor) {\n                revert InvalidAuthor(workflowOwner, s_expectedAuthor);\n            }\n            if (s_expectedWorkflowName != bytes10(0)) {\n                if (s_expectedAuthor == address(0)) revert WorkflowNameRequiresAuthorValidation();\n                if (workflowName != s_expectedWorkflowName) {\n                    revert InvalidWorkflowName(workflowName, s_expectedWorkflowName);\n                }\n            }\n        }\n\n        _processReport(report);\n    }\n\n    function getForwarderAddress() external view returns (address) { return s_forwarderAddress; }\n    function getExpectedAuthor() external view returns (address) { return s_expectedAuthor; }\n    function getExpectedWorkflowName() external view returns (bytes10) { return s_expectedWorkflowName; }\n    function getExpectedWorkflowId() external view returns (bytes32) { return s_expectedWorkflowId; }\n\n    function setForwarderAddress(address _forwarder) external onlyOwner {\n        address prev = s_forwarderAddress;\n        if (_forwarder == address(0)) emit SecurityWarning(\"Forwarder set to zero - INSECURE\");\n        s_forwarderAddress = _forwarder;\n        emit ForwarderAddressUpdated(prev, _forwarder);\n    }\n\n    function setExpectedAuthor(address _author) external onlyOwner {\n        address prev = s_expectedAuthor;\n        s_expectedAuthor = _author;\n        emit ExpectedAuthorUpdated(prev, _author);\n    }\n\n    function setExpectedWorkflowName(string calldata _name) external onlyOwner {\n        bytes10 prev = s_expectedWorkflowName;\n        if (bytes(_name).length == 0) {\n            s_expectedWorkflowName = bytes10(0);\n            emit ExpectedWorkflowNameUpdated(prev, bytes10(0));\n            return;\n        }\n        bytes32 hash = sha256(bytes(_name));\n        bytes memory hex_ = _bytesToHexString(abi.encodePacked(hash));\n        bytes memory first10 = new bytes(10);\n        for (uint256 i = 0; i < 10; i++) first10[i] = hex_[i];\n        s_expectedWorkflowName = bytes10(first10);\n        emit ExpectedWorkflowNameUpdated(prev, s_expectedWorkflowName);\n    }\n\n    function setExpectedWorkflowId(bytes32 _id) external onlyOwner {\n        bytes32 prev = s_expectedWorkflowId;\n        s_expectedWorkflowId = _id;\n        emit ExpectedWorkflowIdUpdated(prev, _id);\n    }\n\n    function _bytesToHexString(bytes memory data) private pure returns (bytes memory) {\n        bytes memory hex_ = new bytes(data.length * 2);\n        for (uint256 i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {\n            hex_[i * 2]     = HEX_CHARS[uint8(data[i] >> 4)];\n            hex_[i * 2 + 1] = HEX_CHARS[uint8(data[i] & 0x0f)];\n        }\n        return hex_;\n    }\n\n    function _decodeMetadata(bytes memory metadata)\n        internal\n        pure\n        returns (bytes32 workflowId, bytes10 workflowName, address workflowOwner)\n    {\n        assembly {\n            workflowId   := mload(add(metadata, 32))\n            workflowName := mload(add(metadata, 64))\n            workflowOwner := shr(mul(12, 8), mload(add(metadata, 74)))\n        }\n    }\n\n    function _processReport(bytes calldata report) internal virtual;\n\n    function supportsInterface(bytes4 interfaceId) public pure virtual override returns (bool) {\n        return interfaceId == type(IReceiver).interfaceId || interfaceId == type(IERC165).interfaceId;\n    }\n}\n","keccak256":"0x2394f077b974812f948fcf675ff01b3279e669b15829107dd6fcf6fa0baecafd","license":"MIT"}},"version":1}

devdoc.details: Architecture:  1. `initializeMarket()` prepares a CTF condition and emits `MarketInitialized` (triggers CRE).  2. CRE detects the event, calls Gemini AI, then submits `onReport(metadata, report)`.  3. The adapter starts a `disputeWindow` timer and emits `ResolutionProposed`.  4. After the window, an authorized finalizer calls `finalizeResolution()` to call `ctf.reportPayouts()`.  5. Before the window elapses (public finalize):     - The contract owner can `adminOverride()` to replace the proposed payouts.     - The multisig (if set) can call `multisigOverride()` which requires M-of-N signers.  6. Owner / multisig bypass (no need to wait for CRE or resolution time):     - `adminResolve()` — owner sets payouts and resolves immediately (Active or Proposed, any time).     - `adminOverride()` — also allowed while Active to start a proposal + dispute window without CRE.     - `multisigOverride()` — signers may begin or complete resolution while Active (first approvals       move the market to Proposed and open the usual dispute window for public finalize). Key invariants:  - AiCTFAdapter is the sole oracle address in every `prepareCondition()` call.  - No market string metadata is stored on-chain — only the IPFS CID via events.  - `finalizeResolution` requires the dispute window to elapse; caller must be owner, multisig signer,    upkeep finalizer, or any address when no multisig/upkeep is configured (local dev).

OwnableInvalidOwner(address).details: The owner is not a valid owner account. (eg. `address(0)`)

OwnableUnauthorizedAccount(address).details: The caller account is not authorized to perform an operation.

adminOverride(bytes32,uint256[]).details: While Active: sets status to Proposed and opens the dispute window (no CRE required).      While Proposed: only callable before the dispute window ends (same as before).

params.payouts: Payout array for the new proposal.

adminResolve(bytes32,uint256[]).details: Works while market is Active (before CRE) or Proposed. Bypasses resolution time,      dispute window, and CRE. Does not require a prior AI proposal.

params.payouts: Payout numerators per outcome (same semantics as CTF `reportPayouts`).

params._ctf: Address of the deployed ConditionalTokens contract.
params._disputeWindow: Seconds after a proposal before it can be finalized.
params._forwarderAddress: Chainlink CRE forwarder (only address allowed to call onReport).
params._multisigSigners: Initial list of multisig signer addresses.

finalizeResolution(bytes32).details: Callable by owner, multisig signers, or the registered upkeep finalizer.      When no multisig and no upkeep are configured (dev), any address may finalize.

initializeMarket(bytes32,string,uint256,.details: Only callable by the MarketRegistry contract.      Emits MarketInitialized — this event is the CRE log trigger.

params.ipfsCid: IPFS CID of the JSON metadata — NOT stored on-chain, emitted only.
params.outcomeCount: Number of outcome slots (2 for binary markets).
params.resolutionTime: Unix timestamp when CRE should attempt resolution.

multisigOverride(bytes32,uint256[]).details: Once `multisigThreshold` approvals are collected, the resolution is finalized      immediately — bypassing the remaining dispute window.      While Active: signers pin payouts, the market moves to Proposed, then approvals accrue;      meeting threshold finalizes immediately (same as after a CRE proposal).      While Proposed: the dispute window must still be open (same as before).

params.payouts: The new payout array all signers are approving.                    All signers must supply identical payouts; any mismatch resets approvals.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

supportsInterface(bytes4).details: Returns true if this contract implements the interface defined by `interfaceId`. See the corresponding https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-165#how-interfaces-are-identified[EIP section] to learn more about how these ids are created. This function call must use less than 30 000 gas.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

adminOverride(bytes32,uint256[]).notice: Owner replaces payouts and (re)starts the dispute window without resolving.

adminResolve(bytes32,uint256[]).notice: Owner may resolve immediately with the given payouts.

ctf().notice: The Gnosis Conditional Token Framework contract

disputeWindow().notice: Duration of the dispute window after a resolution is proposed

finalizeResolution(bytes32).notice: Finalizes a proposed resolution after the dispute window elapses.

initializeMarket(bytes32,string,uint256,.notice: Registers a new prediction market with the CTF and Chainlink CRE.

multisigApprovalCount(bytes32).notice: questionId → current multisig approval count for a proposed override

multisigApprovals(bytes32,address).notice: questionId → signer → has approved the pending proposal override

multisigOverride(bytes32,uint256[]).notice: A multisig signer approves the current pending proposal override.

multisigThreshold().notice: Minimum number of multisig signers required to approve an override

registry().notice: Address of the MarketRegistry (only it may call initializeMarket)

setRegistry(address).notice: Only the deployer (owner) can set the registry address.

upkeepFinalizer().notice: Optional Chainlink Automation upkeep allowed to call finalizeResolution

userdoc.notice: Oracle adapter that resolves Conditional Token Framework markets via Chainlink CRE + Gemini AI.
